who: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding processes cause delays in employee productivity. We automate the generation and distribution of customized onboarding materials instead of manual creation.
problem: Difficulty in creating customized onboarding materials for new employees.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about onboarding
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try template customization and onboarding tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
